name: Hybrid Retrieval Fusion
description: Fuses embeddings (50%) + lexical/trigram (25%) + graph expansion (25%) into one ranked, deduplicated result set. Salvaged from continue's NoRerankerRetrievalPipeline (P-codeintel-9). Fifth step of Greptile's pipeline — the point where gitgecko becomes a usable Greptile competitor.
